name: dotlight-marketplace
description: Marketplace for DotLightSkillset — a lightweight curated Claude Code skillset for .NET developers

plugins.name: dotlight-skillset
plugins.description: A lightweight curated Claude Code skillset for .NET developers — 0.6.1 makes the composition deterministic: SessionStart hook injects triage + skill discipline every session, the review chain (incl. database-review) is wired into skill bodies, and subagent briefs carry the workflow guarantees. On top of 0.6.0: upstream sync (superpowers v6.1.1, dotnet-skills v1.4.1), lazy-senior-dev, database-design-conventions + database-review, persistence-first planning.
